topics.title: AI Infrastructure
topics.executive_summary: AMD and Rackspace signed a definitive agreement on June 16 to deploy 30 MW of AMD-based AI compute capacity across Rackspace's global data centers, establishing AMD as a strategic silicon partner for governed enterprise AI infrastructure.

stories.headline: AMD and Rackspace Lock in 30 MW AI Deployment Deal
stories.body: The partners signed a definitive agreement for phased deployment beginning late 2026 through 2028, establishing AMD as a strategic technology partner at the silicon layer of Rackspace's governed AI stack designed for regulated and sovereign environments.
